page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.6xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 24 dedicated physical cores utilizing the Intel Xeon 8269CY processor clocked at 3.1 GHz. The instance is configured with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations place this instance consistently in the middle 50% tier across multiple workloads. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a stress-ng single-core score of 1436.59 and a multi-core score of 22989.57. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 1277.21 GB/sec, which drops to 107.74 GB/sec for uncached large blocks, alongside a write bandwidth of 49.67 GB/sec. In database operations, the instance achieves 22.01 million operations per second in Redis SET tests and a PassMark database score of 8786.41.

The absence of local NVMe storage and dedicated GPU hardware represents a clear tradeoff, making this instance unsuitable for local-storage-heavy databases or intensive deep learning training. However, the high memory density relative to the 24 dedicated vCPUs provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound workloads that do not require local disk performance. It is well-suited for in-memory databases like Redis, enterprise applications, caching layers, and moderate-scale data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.6xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 24 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, the instance provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, making it highly efficient for memory-intensive applications. It operates on the KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps, though it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmark results show stable mid-tier performance, with a multi-core stress-ng score of 22989.57 and Redis SET throughput reaching 22.01 million operations per second. This hardware profile is optimized for in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise workloads requiring substantial memory capacity without the need for high-speed local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.6xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 24 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 192 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for in-memory databases and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high memory density for memory-bound enterprise applications.
